com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXConnectivityObject

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXObject
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXAbstractCavityDetail, IXAbstractCavityObjectsHolder, IXAbstractConductor, IXAbstractConnector, IXAbstractDevice, IXAbstractPin, IXAbstractPinList, IXAbstractSeal, IXAbstractTerminal, IXAdditionalComponent, IXAssembly, IXBackshell, IXBackshellCavityDetail, IXBackshellTermination, IXBackshellTerminationPlug, IXBackshellTerminationSeal, IXBackshellTerminationTerminal, IXBlock, IXBlockPin, IXBreakoutTape, IXBundle, IXBundleRegion, IXCavity, IXCavityDetail, IXCavityPlug, IXCavitySeal, IXCenterStripConnection, IXClip, IXComponent, IXComponentInterface, IXComponentPathway, IXConnector, IXConnectorBaseObject, IXDevice, IXDeviceConnector, IXDevicePin, IXFixture, IXFunction, IXFunctionPort, IXFunctionSignal, IXGrommet, IXGround, IXHarness, IXHarnessRegister, IXHighway, IXHighwayConductor, IXHole, IXInsulation, IXInsulationRun, IXInterconnect, IXInterconnectDevice, IXInterconnectMember, IXInternalLink, IXInternalPin, IXMarker, IXModuledObject, IXMulticore, IXMultiLocationComponent, IXNet, IXNode, IXNodeComponent, IXOtherComponent, IXOverbraid, IXPinPlug, IXPlatformFunction, IXReferenceNode, IXRefinedCavity, IXRefinedConnector, IXRingTerminal, IXShield, IXSignal, IXSlot, IXSplice, IXSplicePin, IXSpotTape, IXStructureNode, IXTerminal, IXVariantSignal, IXVariantWire, IXWire, IXWireEnd

    public interface IXConnectivityObject
extends IXObject
    Base Interface to represent all connectivity objects.

      java.util.Set<IXDiagramInstance> getInstances()
      Deprecated. 
      This method doesn�t scale well for big projects. Use getInstances(Set) instead.
      java.util.Set<? extends IXDiagramInstance> getInstances(java.util.Set<? extends IXDesign> designs)
      Gets all the diagram instances of this connectivity object that are present in the diagrams of the specified designs.

    • Method Detail

      • getInstances

        java.util.Set<IXDiagramInstance> getInstances()
        Deprecated. This method doesn�t scale well for big projects. Use getInstances(Set) instead.
        Gets all the diagram instances of this connectivity object.
        Returns:
        a Set of diagram instances.

      • getInstances

        java.util.Set<? extends IXDiagramInstance> getInstances(java.util.Set<? extends IXDesign> designs)
        Gets all the diagram instances of this connectivity object that are present in the diagrams of the specified designs.

        Some objects, like multicore, do not have diagram instances representing the connectivity object in the diagram. Although the multicore itself does not have any diagram instances, its inner conductors will have.

        Also note that Daisy chains are not returned as diagram instances for shields. This means that if a shield is only represented via daisy chains, no diagram instances will be returned for it.

        Parameters:
        designs - set of designs
        Returns:
        a set of all the diagram instances representing this connectivity object in the diagrams of the specified designs, if this connectivity is shown in any diagrams of the specified designs. Otherwise, an empty set.

      • getAssembly

        IXAssembly getAssembly()
        Get the assembly in which it is part of
        Returns:
        the assembly in which it is part of, null otherwise

      • getDesign

        IXDesign getDesign()
        Get the design in which it is part of
        Returns:
        the design in which it is part of, null otherwise
